visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white cardigan over a horizontal striped top, stands in a brightly lit grocery aisle in front of a glass-door freezer. She gestures toward the freezer with her hand, looking directly at the camera with a smiling expression. (2) The scene shifts to close-up shots of the freezer interior, displaying stacks of yellow and white boxes. A price tag of $299 is prominently visible. A metal ice cream scooper enters the frame and scoops out a round ball of pale yellow and white swirled ice cream from a large rectangular container. (3) The setting changes to an indoor domestic environment where two women are seated at a table. The first woman is now wearing a light blue top, and a second woman next to her wears a beige top and a pink beret. They are holding small bowls and spoons, actively eating the ice cream and talking. The background shows a shelf with some plush toys and domestic items.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 年輕人. (2) [Subtitle]: 現在年輕人都愛流行這個. [Slogan]: 北海道十勝牛乳. [Logo]: Threads. [Variety]: Threads 上爆紅. [Slogan]: 柚香優格冰淇淋. (3) [Subtitle]: 它吃起來呢就是酸酸甜甜的優格冰. [Variety]: 佈滿了冰淇淋. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後我們都覺得柚子呢雖然它佈滿了冰淇淋. [Variety]: 多多乳酸菌的味道. (5) [Subtitle]: 但吃起來沒什麼柚香的味道反而比較像那種多多乳酸菌的味道. [Variety]: 乳酸菌口味的冰淇淋. (6) [Subtitle]: 所以你平常很愛什麼多多綠乳酸菌. [Variety]: 非常的綿密. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後或者或是優格之類的你都會非常愛. [Variety]: 性價比還蠻高的. (8) [Subtitle]: 因為它對我們來說就是一個乳酸菌口味的冰淇淋. [Variety]: 會有點小失望. (9) [Subtitle]: 然後口感呢非常的綿密. (10) [Subtitle]: 整體來說呢性價比還蠻高的. (11) [Subtitle]: 如果你喜歡乳酸菌或多多的話一定要嘗試看看. (12) [Subtitle]: 但如果你很愛很愛柚子你是衝著柚子來的話你可能會有一點小失望. (13) [Subtitle]: 因為它比較沒有那種柚子層次跟香味.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two primary female creators appear throughout the video, first one alone at the store and then both together during the review.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman has long dark hair and wears a white cardigan then a blue top. The second woman wears a beige top and a pink beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse freezer section with refrigerated products and price labels, transitioning to a home interior with tables and shelves containing plushies.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins the narration over a bright, rhythmic electronic pop background track with a steady synth bass and a four-on-the-floor beat. (2) A sharp mechanical click sound is heard, indicating the opening of a freezer door, followed by a soft metallic scraping sound as an ice cream scooper interacts with the product. (3) The vocal track transitions to a conversational dialogue between two female voices. The primary speaker maintains a friendly, narrative tone with moderate speed. (4) Frequent soft digital 'pop' sound effects punctuate the transitions between different points of the review, while the background music continues at a constant tempo of 128 BPM throughout the entire segment.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Experience/Review -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle review and recommendation of Niseko Yogurt Ice Cream found at Costco. It aims to inform viewers of its popularity on social media (Threads) and provide a detailed taste evaluation, noting that the flavor profile is more akin to lactic acid drinks (like Yakult) than fresh yuzu, ultimately helping potential buyers decide on its value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase, mentioning specific price points, and expressing high cost-performance ratio suggests a promotional review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays and upbeat music to maintain high audience engagement typical of short-form social media content.
